ResponseBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

RequestBody.input: Could you please create bar chart in TRANSPORTATION sector for the operating profit from the uploaded csv file and provide file to me?

output.code:
import pandas as pd

# Load the CSV file
file_path = '/mnt/data/assistant-HAtXA68e7rL54a2T55RBpw-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv'
data = pd.read_csv(file_path)

# Display the first few rows of the dataframe to understand its structure
data.head()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Filter data for the TRANSPORTATION sector
transportation_data = data[data['sector'] == 'TRANSPORTATION']

# Convert operating_profit to numeric
transportation_data['operating_profit'] = transportation_data['operating_profit'].astype(float)

# Sort data by operating profit for better visualization
transportation_data_sorted = transportation_data.sort_values(by='operating_profit', ascending=True)

# Create a bar chart
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.barh(transportation_data_sorted['name'], transportation_data_sorted['operating_profit'], color='skyblue')
plt.xlabel('Operating Profit')
plt.title('Operating Profit in the Transportation Sector')
plt.grid(axis='x', linestyle='--', alpha=0.6)

# Save the plot to a file
plt.savefig('/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png')
plt.close()

'Bar chart created and saved successfully.'

content.text:
The bar chart of operating profit in the transportation sector has been created. You can download it using the link below:

[Download Bar Chart](sandbox:/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png)
